AgentSentry
FeaturesHow It WorksROI CalculatorDemoDocsPricingGitHub

Features

Everything you need to keep AI agents safe, productive, and accountable.

Production Ready

Stable

MCP Server (9 Tools)

Full Model Context Protocol integration with stdio and HTTP transport for seamless Claude Code workflows.

Stable

Hash-Chained Memory

Tamper-evident event storage with auto-pruning, incremental verification, and chunked vector search.

Stable

Progressive Enablement

Five adoption levels from Safe Ground to Full Guard — teams adopt at their own pace.

Stable

Secret Detection

Catches AWS keys, GitHub tokens, hardcoded passwords, SQL injection, and eval usage before they reach production.

Stable

Risk Scoring

Weighted factor analysis scores every change from LOW to CRITICAL based on file count, DB changes, shared code, and branch.

Stable

CLI (11 Commands)

Full command-line interface for init, health checks, metrics, search, streaming, plugins, config, and data management.

Stable

Observability Stack

Structured logging, health checks, circuit breakers, Prometheus metrics, and graceful shutdown — all built in.

In Preview

Beta

Cross-Session Intelligence

Session summaries, pattern detection, and context recall so agents remember what happened last time.

Beta

Streaming Dashboard

Real-time SSE/WebSocket event streaming with a single-file HTML monitoring dashboard.

Beta

Handoff Messages

Generates structured handoff prompts on context overflow for seamless session continuity.

Experimental

Experimental

Plugin System

Extensible architecture with manifest-based plugin discovery, hooks, and validation.

Experimental

Multi-Agent Coordination

Single-machine event-sourced coordination with atomic locks, leases, and task delegation.

AgentSentry

Memory-aware agent safety. Your AI agents never forget — and never go rogue.
